title: Night Vision + FPS Booster
description: A texture pack that brightens dark areas for easier night and cave exploration while keeping Minecraft’s visuals immersive.
body:
# Night Vision by Ownix

✨ **Night Vision by Ownix** is a visually stunning Minecraft **texture pack** that makes dark areas easier to explore without changing gameplay.

🌙 Brighten up nights, caves, and dungeons with enhanced shadows and contrast.  
🛠️ Keep visuals immersive while improving visibility for smoother gameplay.  
🎮 Perfect for adventurers, builders, and explorers who want **clear vision in low-light areas**.

## Features
- 🌌 Brighter night and cave textures  
- 👀 Enhanced visibility without losing Minecraft’s natural look  
- ⚡ Smooth, immersive design for all players

---

**🎨 Design & Branding:**  
Designed by **Ownix Studio**
